metadata.name: Handle a Team's Protest of a Game Result

description: A team files a formal protest of a game's result, claiming a rule was misapplied by the officials on the final play.

nodes.task_description: Receive the formal protest from the team.
Review the official rulebook and the video of the play in question.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent reviews the play and determines the officials did, in fact, misapply the rule.

nodes.task_description: Uphold the protest and schedule the final play of the game to be replayed.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent makes a ruling and schedules the replay.
